description: Convert the baseline aft-swept eCRM-001 transport model into a forward-swept wing (FSW) variant based on an engineering specification. The baseline model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Read the engineering specification document at /home/ga/Desktop/fsw_spec.txt for the required parameter changes (you will need to change the Wing sweep, Wing X-Location, Wing tip twist, and Horizontal Tail sweep). Use the OpenVSP GUI to make these geometric changes, then save the modified model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_fsw.vsp3.
